texto: We gaze up at the same stars, the sky covers us all, the same universe encompasses us. What does it matter what practical system we adopt in our search for the truth? Not by one avenue only can we arrive at so tremendous a secret.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Quintus Aurelius Symmachus que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “We gaze up at the same stars, the sky covers us all, the same universe encompasses us. What does …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, sabedoria, stars, com foco em termino e reflexao.
